creator: Lyubomir.Russev@equant-bg.com
text:
This (4.4-RELEASE install failure at mounting root from ufs:/dev/md0c)also
happens on my PC with genuine Intel Pentium 233 MMX/Intel430-TX MB/256MB
RAM/6.4GB Quantum/RealTek 10/100 PCI/Samsung SD-612 DVD-ROM.
I have no problems with 4.3-RELEASE installation.
